41	# Sentinel: when a cron agent has nothing new to report, it can start its
42	# response with this marker to suppress delivery.  Output is still saved
43	# locally for audit.

47	_hermes_home = get_hermes_home()
48	
49	# File-based lock prevents concurrent ticks from gateway + daemon + systemd timer
50	_LOCK_DIR = _hermes_home / "cron"
51	_LOCK_FILE = _LOCK_DIR / ".tick.lock"

54	def _resolve_origin(job: dict) -> Optional[dict]:
55	    """Extract origin info from a job, preserving any extra routing metadata."""
56	    origin = job.get("origin")
57	    if not origin:
58	        return None
59	    platform = origin.get("platform")
60	    chat_id = origin.get("chat_id")
61	    if platform and chat_id:
62	        return origin
63	    return None
